summary: Label job orchestration works on a real backfill run, exposes progress through the summary API, and remains isolated from crawl run status.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Create label job for valid run
checks.expected: Valid label job created or reused

checks.name: CHECK-02: Lifecycle transitions
checks.actual: Observed PENDING, then RUNNING with partial counts, then DONE at 77/77 labeled

checks.name: CHECK-03: Summary API progress counts
checks.actual: Summary returned 77 total, 77 labeled, 0 fallback, 0 failed, plus counts_by_author_role

checks.name: CHECK-04: Duplicate same run + taxonomy handled
checks.expected: Second trigger blocked or reused logically
checks.actual: Second POST returned the same label_job_id=label-job-a5ee639925 without creating a second job

checks.name: CHECK-05: Crawl run status unchanged
checks.expected: Labeling does not mutate crawl run lifecycle
checks.actual: run-755de99fc7 remained status=CANCELLED while labeling completed separately
